meaning: 萨格勒布[南斯拉夫西北部城市]
examples: The atmosphere in Zagreb these days is febrile.
What they learn in Accra and Brazzaville will travel with them to Vancouver and Zagreb.
On the day the defence agreement was signed, a shooting in Zagreb became front-page news across the region.
Two days later she was off to Zagreb, Croatia to kick off the 110-date I Am tour.
The list of its events this year reads like a modern Grand Tour: Barcelona, Berlin, Copenhagen, Prague, Zagreb.
